items.summary: Fix the date extraction logic in `frontend/src/lib/ocrExtraction.ts` so that the report date is reliably detected from uploaded medical report documents. Expand the regex patterns to cover common date formats found in medical reports, including but not limited to: 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'MM/DD/YYYY', 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'DD-MM-YYYY', 'DD MMM YYYY' (e.g., '12 Jan 2024'), 'MMM DD, YYYY' (e.g., 'Jan 12, 2024'), and label-prefixed formats such as 'Date:', 'Report Date:', 'Collection Date:', 'Sample Date:', 'Test Date:', and 'Date of Report:'. The extracted date must be returned as a valid ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) in the `ExtractedTestData` result and pre-populated in the date field of each extracted record displayed in the `UploadRecordForm` component.
